Hardware Component File

5DH DCDC 29bits

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference 5DH_DCDC_EXTID_V1.0_20180404T105050.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 18DADDF1
Receive ID 18DAF1DD
Functional Addr DD
Functional Name DCDC
